value: Not every drink has a story.

For generations, sugarcane juice has been enjoyed on warm afternoons, shared with family and friends, and served fresh from the press.At The Cane House, we're bringing that experience to Sutton - one glass at a time.Watch your juice being freshly pressed, enjoy the natural sweetness of real sugarcane, and take a moment to slow down and enjoy life's simple pleasures.Experience Fresh Sugarcane Juice Today
